Supplemental HRSN Physical Activity Indicator CHAR 1
NN_NVGTD_SPLMTL_SBSTNC_USE_SW Navigated Supplemental HRSN Substance Use Indicator CHAR 1
NE_NVGTR_CNTCT_ATMPT_NUM Number of navigator attempts to contact beneficiary (successful or not) NUM 2
NE_NVGTR_SUCSFL_CNTCT_NUM Number of navigator successful contacts with beneficiary NUM 2
NE_NVGTR_AVG_CNTCT_MNTS_NUM Average duration of successful contacts with beneficiary NUM 5
NN_CORE_1_CNCTED_TO_CSP_SW At Least 1 Core HRSN Connected to CSP, None
